offer: For property managers processing 5–15 service requests/month, inefficient scheduling causes delayed maintenance. We provide a facilities maintenance scheduler instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.
problem: Inefficient scheduling of maintenance requests leads to delayed service.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with a demo video
Share insights in community forums for property managers
try_it: Let users log service requests and dispatch technicians manually
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Implement default reminder schedules for efficiency
Allow CSV import for existing service data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
